label: Claude chat (multi-user)
info:
Multi-user interactive chat. A Vue app (examples/chat-demo) connects over WebSocket at ws://localhost:1880/claude, logs in with a simple in-memory username/password, then chats. Each user gets a separate Claude conversation (session) and replies are routed back only to that user's connection.

Demo users live in flow context (alice/alice123, bob/bob123). Set the API key on the claude-agent-configuration node before deploying.

name: auth + route in
